# gads CLI

A Google Ads / Google platform CLI built for agent-driven automation.

## Discovery

> Run `tools/gads catalog --json` to get the full command/parameter manifest.
> This is the canonical entry point — do not hardcode command lists.

## Reference

- AGENTS.md — full capability index, output contract, exit codes, mutation discipline
- `tools/gads --help` — top-level usage
- `tools/gads <command> --help` — per-command usage

## v3.9.0 New Commands

### Merchant Center
`gads merchant register-gcp -e EMAIL [--account ID] [--json]`
Registers the GCP OAuth project with Merchant Center (fixes GCP_NOT_REGISTERED).
POST to developerRegistration:registerGcp. One-time setup; wait ~5 min after.



7 new read-only gap checks under `gads analyze`:
- `rsa-lengths` — headlines < 20 or descriptions < 60 chars
- `rsa-duplicates` — intra-RSA duplicate headline detection
- `dki` — Dynamic Keyword Insertion presence/absence
- `ad-schedule` — SEARCH campaigns missing dayparting rules
- `attribution` — Last-Click conversion action flag
- `budget-is` — search_budget_lost_impression_share > 10%
- `qs-distribution` — QS sub-signal ABOVE/AVERAGE/BELOW band breakdown

New top-level command: `gads audit [--days N] [--format md|json]`
Runs the full 12-section compliance audit. `--format json` for agent pipelines.

## Account

- Client: Talas Ads (355-285-6345)
- Manager: 670-695-5825
- Currency: AED | API version: v24

## Also see mads-cli

For Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads — Marketing API, Conversions API, Commerce Manager — the sister
CLI: https://github.com/talas9/mads-cli
